_description: Agent-friendly metadata for RBY1 teleoperation HDF5 datasets. Describes the robomimic-style HDF5 layout produced by RobomimicHDF5Writer from TeleopDataCollector.

hands.tactile_force_layout: 5 fingers x 120 taxels x 3 axes (force xyz)

collection.method: WebRTC body pose teleoperation with SEW (Shoulder-Elbow-Wrist) geometric IK solver
collection.hand_retargeting: XHand retargeting from human finger pose via YAML config

camera.note: Raw Aria RGB frames are resized to stored_resolution via cv2.INTER_LINEAR before saving. The actual stored resolution depends on the aria_resolution parameter passed to TeleopDataCollector.

collection.base_control: Incremental SE(2) commands (delta_x, delta_y, delta_yaw) computed from body pose relative to initial calibration frame

total.description: Total number of samples across all demos

num_samples.description: Number of timesteps in this episode (N)

obs._description: Observation group: all proprioceptive state, hand state, timestamps, and optional image data.

robot0_joint_pos.description: Full robot joint positions from hardware. Order: base(4) + torso(6) + right_arm(7) + left_arm(7) + head(2).

robot0_joint_vel.description: Full robot joint velocities from hardware. Same ordering as robot0_joint_pos.

robot_ts.description: Timestamp of each robot state reading (time.time() at read).

hand_left_qpos.description: Left XHand joint positions (12 DOF). Actual hand hardware readings.

hand_right_qpos.description: Right XHand joint positions (12 DOF). Actual hand hardware readings.

hand_left_cmd_qpos.description: Left XHand commanded joint positions (from retargeting). This is the action target sent to the hand controller.

hand_right_cmd_qpos.description: Right XHand commanded joint positions (from retargeting). This is the action target sent to the hand controller.

hand_left_finger_pos.description: Left hand finger position sensor readings (12-dim).

hand_right_finger_pos.description: Right hand finger position sensor readings (12-dim).

hand_left_finger_raw_pos.description: Left hand raw (unprocessed) finger position sensor readings.

hand_right_finger_raw_pos.description: Right hand raw (unprocessed) finger position sensor readings.

hand_left_tactile_force.description: Left hand tactile force readings. Layout: 5 fingers x 120 taxels x 3 axes = 1800, stored flattened.

hand_right_tactile_force.description: Right hand tactile force readings. Same layout as hand_left_tactile_force.

hand_left_tactile_temp.description: Left hand tactile temperature readings. Layout: 5 fingers x 20 thermistors = 100, stored flattened.

hand_right_tactile_temp.description: Right hand tactile temperature readings. Same layout as hand_left_tactile_temp.

eef_right_proprio.description: Right end-effector proprioceptive pose as a flattened 4x4 homogeneous transformation matrix (row-major). Represents the current FK-derived EEF pose in world frame.

eef_left_proprio.description: Left end-effector proprioceptive pose as a flattened 4x4 homogeneous transformation matrix (row-major). Same convention as eef_right_proprio.

hand_ts_left.description: Timestamp of each left hand reading.

hand_ts_right.description: Timestamp of each right hand reading.

aria_ts.description: Aria camera timestamp for each frame. Zero if Aria streaming was not active.

cmd_ts.description: Timestamp when the IK command was computed and sent to the robot.

aria_image.description: Aria RGB egocentric camera images. Only present if --aria_streaming was enabled during collection. Resolution depends on aria_resolution parameter (default 640x640 or 768x768).

actions._description: Action group: multiple pre-composed action representations for different policy use cases. All are float32.

joint.description: Full-body joint-space action including both arms, torso, head, base velocity, and both hand commands.

eef.description: End-effector space action: commanded EEF poses (as flattened 4x4 matrices) plus hand commands.

composition.name: eef_right_cmd
composition.description: Right EEF commanded pose, flattened 4x4 homogeneous matrix (row-major)

composition.name: eef_left_cmd
composition.description: Left EEF commanded pose, flattened 4x4 homogeneous matrix (row-major)

joint_arm.description: Arm-only joint-space action (no torso, head, base, or hands).

joint_arm_hand.description: Arm + hand joint-space action (no torso, head, or base).

joint_arm_head_torso_base.description: Full upper-body + base action without hand commands.

rewards.description: Reward signal per timestep. Currently always zeros (teleoperation data, no reward defined).

dones.description: Done flag per timestep. Currently always zeros (episode boundaries defined by demo group, not by done flags).

file_naming.description: Files are named with the --dataset_name argument followed by a datetime stamp. Saved to --dataset_path directory.

timestamps_and_synchronization.note: Robot state, hand state, Aria images, and IK commands are recorded at different actual rates and may have small timing offsets. All timestamps are epoch seconds (time.time()) except aria_ts which may use device time.
timestamps_and_synchronization.robot_ts: When robot_state.position was read from hardware
timestamps_and_synchronization.cmd_ts: When the IK solution was computed and the command was sent
timestamps_and_synchronization.hand_ts_left: When left hand state was last read
timestamps_and_synchronization.hand_ts_right: When right hand state was last read
timestamps_and_synchronization.aria_ts: Aria device timestamp for the corresponding RGB frame (0.0 if streaming disabled)

usage_notes.obs_for_policy: Typical policy observations: robot0_joint_pos (or subsets via index_map), hand_left_qpos, hand_right_qpos, eef_right_proprio, eef_left_proprio, and optionally aria_image.
usage_notes.action_spaces: Choose action representation based on task: 'joint_arm' for arm-only tasks, 'joint_arm_hand' for manipulation with dexterous hands, 'joint' for full-body control, 'eef' for Cartesian-space policies.
usage_notes.zero_padding: If a sensor was unavailable during recording (e.g., no hand connected, no Aria streaming), the corresponding arrays are zero-filled. Check timestamps to verify data validity.
usage_notes.buffer_size: Default ring buffer is 6000 samples (~200s at 30Hz). Episodes longer than buffer_size will lose the oldest samples.
